0:
The Impresario would invite you to participate in a devilishly delightful All Saints' Wake celebration.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

The Impresario would invite you to participate in a devilishly delightful All Saints' Wake celebration.
※This quest is available for a limited time only.

1:
In order to fully enjoy the All Saints' Wake festivities, the Impresario has gifted you with a costume befitting the occasion. Don the guise to take your place among the terrors of the night, then speak with him anew.

※Please note that you will be unable to complete this quest after the seasonal event has ended. For details, please check the Lodestone.

71:
Wh-Whaaa...!?
An adventurer!? Y-You don't scare me! Besides, the boss told me only to answer to my fellow undead.
